blocks.text: MacIntyre four shots clear at TPC San Antonio heading into the final round. Reitan sits T7, eight back — needs a charge, but this is Masters week warm-up and anything moves fast.
Barcelona lead La Liga by four points. A win at the Metropolitano puts the title almost out of reach for Madrid. Simeone's Atlético, fourth and desperate, will make this ugly.
🎾 Sat — Monte-Carlo Masters: Ruud's favourite clay kingdom, first Roland Garros dress rehearsal of 2026
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders: seven Norwegians hit the cobbles from Antwerp to Oudenaarde

blocks.label: This Week
items: ⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich at Real Madrid — Champions League QF, Bernabéu, Europe's heavyweight clash
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Arsenal at Sporting CP — Gunners 9 pts clear in PL, Ødegaard fit? Lisbon awaits
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest: rain (Håvard Nygaard) and the year's biggest Counter-Strike event
